description: Surface and switch between versions of a page over time. Inline data source + trigger + picker popover; three actions (navigate / swap / diff). Modes auto-derived from data shape (releases vs history).

attributes.name: data-versions
attributes.description: Inline JSON array of version entries: { id, label?, url?, date?, author?, summary?, archived?, draft?, current?, versionUrl? }. Alternative: a <script type="application/json" data-versions> child.

attributes.name: data-versioned-region
attributes.description: CSS selector for the swappable / diffable region (default: "[data-versioned], main")

attributes.name: data-diff-position
attributes.description: "before" (default) | "after" — where to mount the diff render

events.name: version-switcher:select
events.description: Fires when an entry is selected (before the action runs)

events.name: version-switcher:before-navigate
events.description: Cancellable. Fires before location.href is set; preventDefault() blocks navigation.

events.name: version-switcher:before-swap
events.description: Cancellable. Fires before swap fetches and replaces the versioned region.

events.name: version-switcher:swap
events.description: Fires after swap completes. Versioned region replaced + vb:version meta updated.

events.name: version-switcher:before-diff
events.description: Cancellable. Fires before diff fetches the other version.

events.name: version-switcher:diff
events.description: Fires after diff renders. diffElement is the mounted <change-set>.

childAttributes.name: data-versions
childAttributes.description: Marks a <script type="application/json"> child as the versions JSON source
